name: C2xGetStationAttributeInt64
title: C2xGetStationAttributeInt64
description: This function returns the actual value of the integer-typed scenario attribute. Form 1 of the function returns values of an attribute of the calling (current) station. Form 2 allows to get values of all attributes of any station in the scenario, even if the scenario station does not have an assigned database node.
return: The integer value of the attribute at the time of function call.
